utterances.text: Yes, they have an appetizer menu.

utterances.speaker: USER
utterances.text: Are they flexible when taking reservations?

utterances.speaker: ASSISTANT
utterances.text: No, they do not take any reservations.

utterances.speaker: USER
utterances.text: Do you know the hours that they are open for dinner on Sunday?

utterances.speaker: ASSISTANT
utterances.text: They are closed on Sundays.

utterances.speaker: USER
utterances.text: Okay. Thank you so much. Bye.

utterances.speaker: USER
utterances.text: Okay,Bye.

utterances.speaker: ASSISTANT
utterances.text: Hi, how can I help you?

utterances.speaker: USER
utterances.text: I'd like to help finding a restaurant.

utterances.speaker: ASSISTANT
utterances.text: Okay, where are you located?

utterances.speaker: USER
utterances.text: Rochester, New York.

utterances.speaker: ASSISTANT
utterances.text: Okay, and what type of food would you like?

utterances.speaker: USER
utterances.text: Chinese food, please.

utterances.speaker: ASSISTANT
utterances.text: Okay, what are your requirements?

utterances.speaker: USER
utterances.text: It has to be dirt cheap.

utterances.speaker: ASSISTANT
utterances.text: Locate any other requirements.

utterances.speaker: USER
utterances.text: I would like it not to be very noisy.

utterances.speaker: ASSISTANT
utterances.text: I have found a few locations, Yummy Garden and New Number One Chinese Restaurant. Did you want to know more information?

utterances.speaker: USER
utterances.text: No, thank you.

utterances.speaker: ASSISTANT
utterances.text: Okay, enjoy your meal.

utterances.speaker: USER
utterances.text: Hello.

utterances.speaker: ASSISTANT
utterances.text: Hi, how can I help you?

utterances.speaker: USER
utterances.text: I'm in the Central Park area and I'm wondering if there's an ice cream parlor near here.

utterances.speaker: ASSISTANT
utterances.text: Hold.

utterances.speaker: ASSISTANT
utterances.text: Just a moment.

utterances.speaker: ASSISTANT
utterances.text: There are ice cream places near you. A Baskin Robbins Nugget Ice Cream Ben & Jerry's Cold Stone Creamery and Little Man Ice.

utterances.speaker: USER
utterances.text: Where's the Baskin Robbins at?

utterances.speaker: ASSISTANT
utterances.text: It is located at 1155 South Havana Street number 63 80012.

utterances.speaker: USER
utterances.text: Okay, can you tell me at what time they close?

utterances.speaker: ASSISTANT
utterances.text: They close at 10 pm.

utterances.speaker: USER
utterances.text: Thank you so much, I appreciate your help.

utterances.speaker: ASSISTANT
utterances.text: You're welcome, have a great night.

utterances.speaker: USER
utterances.text: You too.

utterances.speaker: ASSISTANT
utterances.text: How can I help you?

utterances.speaker: USER
utterances.text: I'm planning a special dinner at Mother in Sacramento, California. Are they open on Sunday?

utterances.speaker: ASSISTANT
utterances.text: Unfortunately, the restaurant is closed on Sundays.

utterances.speaker: USER
utterances.text: Do they take reservations?

utterances.speaker: ASSISTANT
utterances.text: Mother restaurant does not take reservations.

utterances.speaker: USER
utterances.text: What appetizers do they offer?

utterances.speaker: ASSISTANT
utterances.text: Currently on their menu their appetizers include coin fries, collard greens, chicken fried mushrooms and turmeric hummus.

utterances.speaker: USER
utterances.text: What hotel accommodations are nearby within walking distance?

utterances.speaker: ASSISTANT
utterances.text: Please, give me one second while I find that information.

utterances.speaker: USER
utterances.text: Okay.

utterances.speaker: ASSISTANT
utterances.text: There is a Sheraton Grand Sacramento Hotel about a five minute walk away.

utterances.speaker: USER
utterances.text: Okay, that's all I needed to know.

utterances.speaker: ASSISTANT
utterances.text: Awesome, glad I could assist you, have a great day. Bye.

utterances.speaker: ASSISTANT
utterances.text: Hi. How can I help you?

utterances.speaker: USER
utterances.text: I'd like to have dinner tonight.

utterances.speaker: ASSISTANT
utterances.text: Would you like to order take-out, cook at home or go out?

utterances.speaker: USER
utterances.text: I'd like to order takeout.

utterances.speaker: ASSISTANT
utterances.text: What did you want to eat?

utterances.speaker: USER
utterances.text: I don't know. What do you recommend?

utterances.speaker: ASSISTANT
utterances.text: I have Golden Boy Pizza, Sam Wo and San Tung.

utterances.speaker: USER
utterances.text: Yeah, let's go to Golden Boy Pizza. Do they have stromboli there, as well?

utterances.speaker: ASSISTANT
utterances.text: Yes.

utterances.speaker: USER
utterances.text: Alright. I think I'll have stromboli at Golden Boy Pizza.

utterances.speaker: ASSISTANT
utterances.text: Got it.

utterances.speaker: USER
utterances.text: Thank you.

utterances.speaker: ASSISTANT
utterances.text: Bye. Until next time.

utterances.speaker: ASSISTANT
utterances.text: Hello. How may I help you?

utterances.speaker: USER
utterances.text: Hello. What should I do for dinner tonight?

utterances.speaker: ASSISTANT
utterances.text: Would you like to order take-out, cook at home, or go out?

utterances.speaker: USER
utterances.text: I would like to order takeout.

utterances.speaker: ASSISTANT
utterances.text: What kind of food would you like to eat?

utterances.speaker: USER
utterances.text: I'm thinking about pizza.

utterances.speaker: ASSISTANT
utterances.text: You're welcome, goodbye.

utterances.speaker: ASSISTANT
utterances.text: How about the Hawaiin pizza, or the margarita or the Alamo pizza?

utterances.speaker: USER
utterances.text: How much is a Hawaiian pizza?

utterances.speaker: ASSISTANT
utterances.text: One slice is $6.65 from Serrano's Pizza.

utterances.speaker: USER
utterances.text: Oh, that sounds like a winner to me, then.

utterances.speaker: ASSISTANT
utterances.text: Anything else?

utterances.speaker: USER
utterances.text: That'd be it for today. Thank you.

utterances.speaker: ASSISTANT
utterances.text: I will email you the directions. Enjoy your pizza.

utterances.speaker: USER
utterances.text: Perfect. Thank you.

utterances.speaker: USER
utterances.text: Yes, I'm looking for a place to have dessert.

utterances.speaker: ASSISTANT
utterances.text: Hey there, how can I help you?

utterances.speaker: ASSISTANT
utterances.text: I see you are in Denver Colorado, is that right?

utterances.speaker: USER
utterances.text: Yes.

utterances.speaker: ASSISTANT
utterances.text: What type of dessert are you looking for?

utterances.speaker: USER
utterances.text: Pie.

utterances.speaker: ASSISTANT
utterances.text: How many restaurant star ratings do you prefer?

utterances.speaker: USER
utterances.text: 3 and 1/2 or above.

utterances.speaker: ASSISTANT
utterances.text: I found a spot for you.

utterances.speaker: USER
utterances.text: Okay.

utterances.speaker: ASSISTANT
utterances.text: Granny Scott's Pie Shop.

utterances.speaker: USER
utterances.text: Alright.

utterances.speaker: ASSISTANT
utterances.text: Over 25 housemade pies star at this quaint storefront with some seats, plus sandwiches & salads.

utterances.speaker: USER
utterances.text: That works.

utterances.speaker: ASSISTANT
utterances.text: You are all set.

utterances.speaker: USER
utterances.text: Thank you.

utterances.speaker: ASSISTANT
utterances.text: How can I help you today?

utterances.speaker: USER
utterances.text: I'm hungry.

utterances.speaker: ASSISTANT
utterances.text: What would you like to eat?

utterances.speaker: USER
utterances.text: Pizza.

utterances.speaker: ASSISTANT
utterances.text: Where are you right now?

utterances.speaker: USER
utterances.text: California.

utterances.speaker: ASSISTANT
utterances.text: Okay.

utterances.speaker: ASSISTANT
utterances.text: Where are you currently walking in Davis, CA?

utterances.speaker: USER
utterances.text: I'm in Downtown.

utterances.speaker: ASSISTANT
utterances.text: Ok.

utterances.speaker: USER
utterances.text: I need a slice of pizza, so make sure that the place you find serve slices.

utterances.speaker: ASSISTANT
utterances.text: Ok. I've found a place that serve slices of pizza for you in Davis, CA.

utterances.speaker: USER
utterances.text: Tell me the place?

utterances.speaker: ASSISTANT
utterances.text: UC Davis Young Chefs in California.

utterances.speaker: USER
utterances.text: Okay, thank you. Let me choose that.

utterances.speaker: ASSISTANT
utterances.text: Ok, thanks.

utterances.speaker: ASSISTANT
utterances.text: How can I help you?

utterances.speaker: USER
utterances.text: I have to find somewhere for dinner near Bank of America Stadium in Charlotte.

utterances.speaker: ASSISTANT
utterances.text: I can help you with that, what are you in the mood for?

utterances.speaker: USER
utterances.text: Just American cuisine.

utterances.speaker: ASSISTANT
utterances.text: Okay, Do you have any other preferences for the restaurant?

utterances.speaker: USER
utterances.text: Something with entertainment will be great, some music, but I've also got kids.

utterances.speaker: ASSISTANT
utterances.text: Okay, let me see what I can find. I wasn't able to find any restaurants with live entertainment or music but I did find Mert's Heart and Soul which is good for the entire family.

utterances.speaker: ASSISTANT
utterances.text: I wasn't able to find any restaurants with live entertainment or music but I did find Mert's Heart and Soul which is good for the entire family.

utterances.speaker: USER
utterances.text: How late are they open?

utterances.speaker: ASSISTANT
utterances.text: They're open till 11:30 p.m.

utterances.speaker: USER
utterances.text: And what's the address?

utterances.speaker: ASSISTANT
utterances.text: Here's the address 214 N College St, Charlotte, NC 28202.

utterances.speaker: USER
utterances.text: Okay, thank you.

utterances.speaker: ASSISTANT
utterances.text: You're welcome and goodbye.

utterances.speaker: USER
utterances.text: Hello, I'm in Charlotte, North Carolina, near the Bank of America Stadium. I'm looking for a place to eat dinner tonight.

utterances.speaker: USER
utterances.text: Can you help me?

utterances.speaker: ASSISTANT
utterances.text: Hello! Yes, sure I can help you.

utterances.speaker: ASSISTANT
utterances.text: Would you like to have pizza with gluten free options?

utterances.speaker: USER
utterances.text: (added)

utterances.speaker: USER
utterances.text: Yeah, I'll go with the gluten free.

utterances.speaker: ASSISTANT
utterances.text: Okay, I got it.

utterances.speaker: USER
utterances.text: Thank you.

utterances.speaker: ASSISTANT
utterances.text: Let me check that what can I find for you?

utterances.speaker: USER
utterances.text: Yeah.

utterances.speaker: ASSISTANT
utterances.text: I have found Mellow Mushroom with a 4.4 star rating, gluten-free options. It is located at 14835 Ballantyne Village Way, Charlette NC.

utterances.speaker: USER
utterances.text: Oh, nice. Send me the information and I'm going to head over there tonight. I appreciate it.

utterances.speaker: ASSISTANT
utterances.text: Okay, great! I have sent that to your email. I hope you enjoy the dinner.

utterances.speaker: USER
utterances.text: Thank you.

utterances.speaker: ASSISTANT
utterances.text: You're welcome.

utterances.speaker: ASSISTANT
utterances.text: Goodbye.

utterances.speaker: USER
utterances.text: Bye.

utterances.speaker: USER
utterances.text: Hi, I'd like help finding a restaurant in Arcata, California.

utterances.speaker: ASSISTANT
utterances.text: Hello. How can I help you?

utterances.speaker: ASSISTANT
utterances.text: Sure, what were you in the mood to eat?

utterances.speaker: USER
utterances.text: Italian food.

utterances.speaker: ASSISTANT
utterances.text: Any preferences for this restaurant?

utterances.speaker: USER
utterances.text: I would like the place to have gluten-free options and also have specials.

utterances.speaker: ASSISTANT
utterances.text: Okay, I found a few places that match.

utterances.speaker: USER
utterances.text: Okay.

utterances.speaker: ASSISTANT
utterances.text: How about La Trattoria or Abruzzi Ristorante or Mazzottis on the Plaza?

utterances.speaker: ASSISTANT
utterances.text: You're welcome.

utterances.speaker: USER
utterances.text: What's the address for Mazzottis?

utterances.speaker: ASSISTANT
utterances.text: It is located at 773 8th St, Arcata, CA 95521.

utterances.speaker: USER
utterances.text: Okay. I'll choose that. Thank you.

utterances.speaker: ASSISTANT
utterances.text: Enjoy your food.
